name: wots_pkFromSig(sig, M, PK.seed, ADRS)
label: Algorithm 8

inputs.name: sig
inputs.description: len * n-byte WOTS+ signature, array of len n-byte chain values

inputs.name: PK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte public seed from SLH-DSA public key

inputs.name: ADRS
inputs.description: 32-byte address structure, type set to WOTS_HASH with layer, tree, and key pair addresses set

outputs.name: pksig
outputs.description: n-byte WOTS+ public key derived from the signature and message

body_raw: for i from 0 to len1 - 1 do
msg ← msg ∥ base_2b(toByte(csum, ⌈len2 * lgw / 8⌉), lgw, len2)
for i from 0 to len - 1 do
tmp[i] ← chain(sig[i], msg[i], w - 1 - msg[i], PK.seed, ADRS)
